title: sub_GAME_7F041160 door test passes raw DoorRecord arg0+0xD0 (garbage bbox) to ray-vs-OBB

evidence.path: src/game/chrobjhandler.c:3616 calls sub_GAME_7F0747D0((u8*)arg0+0xD0, ...) where arg0 is a DoorRecord (type==1). The correct native form exists at chrobjhandler.c:38644: sub_GAME_7F0747D0(&door->bbox,...). DoorRecord.bbox is N64 0xD0 (bondtypes.h:2973) but DoorRecord inherits the +0x10-grown ObjectRecord AND has 2 pointers just before bbox (linkedDoor@0xC8, unkcc Vertex*@0xCC) -> bbox at native ~0xE8. Raw 0xD0 feeds a garbage bbox into the door shot/collision test. Fix: &((DoorRecord*)arg0)->bbox.

src/game/chrobjhandler.c:3616 passes &((DoorRecord*)arg0)->bbox (matching the correct form at 38644); raw arg0+0xD0 was a garbage OBB on the pointer-grown DoorRecord. Byte-identical on all 7 tapes; gated GE007_NO_DOOR_BBOX_OFFSET_FIX.
